meta.title: Sector-specific AI training — Cercle IA
meta.description: AI training by professional sector: lawyers, consultants, executives, HR and doctors. Tailored and applicable from day one.

hero.title: AI adapted
hero.description: Every profession has its tools, constraints and challenges. Our sector-specific training starts from your professional reality to give you a method you can apply from the very next day.

formationsGrid.title: Every profession has its constraints. Every programme starts there.

formations.title: AI for lawyers and legal professionals
formations.desc: Case law research, document drafting, document analysis — while respecting professional secrecy and ethical obligations.
formations.cta: Training for lawyers and legal professionals

formations.title: AI for consultants
formations.desc: Accelerate your deliverables, automate sector research and gain productivity on your consulting assignments.

formations.title: AI for executives
formations.desc: Drive your organisation's AI transformation with method. Strategy, governance and augmented decision-making.

formations.title: AI for HR professionals
formations.desc: Recruitment, job posting writing, interviews and HR analysis — without sacrificing human judgement.

formations.title: AI for doctors
formations.desc: Clinical documentation, bibliographic research and patient communication — while respecting medical confidentiality and regulations.

bootcamp.title: The AI bootcamp: fixed programme, set dates
bootcamp.description: Unlike the tailored sector training, the AI bootcamp is a structured programme with defined content, format and pricing. Ideal for getting started quickly.

card.title: Master generative AI in your profession
card.description: 3 masterclass sessions + individual 1-on-1 coaching + Cercle GPT included. A complete programme, applicable from the first session. Open to all professionals.

surMesure.title: Training adapted to your constraints
surMesure.description: Every programme can be organised in-house for your teams, adapted to your specific sector, your regulations and your tools.
surMesure.cta: Organise a session for my team

points.title: Adapted to your sector
points.desc: Use cases, tools and constraints specific to your profession.

pourQui.title: You have expertise in your field. Not in AI.

profiles.title: The pragmatist
profiles.desc: You want concrete results, not theory. You're looking for what AI can do for you today.

profiles.title: The informed sceptic
profiles.desc: You've tried ChatGPT and the results disappointed you. You want to understand why and how to do better.

profiles.title: The decision-maker
profiles.desc: You need to train your teams or make decisions about AI. You need a clear, operational vision.

pourQui.footnote: No technical skills required. Just your profession and your standards.

items.body: Formation professionnelle fluide et accessible à haute valeur ajoutée. Les informations apprises et conseils donnés permettent de donner un nouvel élan (inattendu) à tout un chacun afin de se retrouver dans les méandres de l'IA.
items.name: Steve Griess

items.pull: Tarik is the go to person for digital strategy in Brussels!
items.name: Yves Melin

items.pull: Highly recommended for anyone willing to get down to the brass tacks of this intriguing technology.
items.body: I recently completed five 2-hour AI training sessions. The program offered a detailed overview of key AI tools and provided very concrete, practice-oriented guidance.
items.name: Prescillia Algrain

items.body: J'ai suivi 3 formations de 2 heures cette année. Merci Tarik & Team !
items.name: Edouard Cambier

items.pull: Thank you for the interesting presentation!
items.body: Very recommended for all lawyers and managers. Very nice to have welcomed you at EQUI.
items.name: Marie Michaud-Nerard

items.body: Parmi l'amas de formations disponibles, en voici une – enfin – concrète, sincère, pragmatique et utile à tous les indépendants (d'esprit ou de pratique).
items.name: Adam Tricha

ctaFinal.eyebrow: Not sure which programme is right?
ctaFinal.title: Let's discuss it in 15 minutes
ctaFinal.description: A quick conversation is enough to identify the most suitable training for your context: your profession, your tools, your objectives.
